message:
fix(robot): retry local DB when archive snapshot misses canonically registered agents

When prefer_archive_snapshot_when_local_db_lags_archive switches the robot
CLI to an archive-reconstructed DB, agents registered via MCP tools (which
exist in sqlite but may not yet have profile.json committed to the git
archive) become invisible. The archive fallback then tries the archive
again — same result. The original local DB is never retried.

Fix: after archive-based resolution fails with "agent not found", open a
fresh local DB connection and retry. This covers the window between agent
registration and git commit coalescer flush.

Closes br-q0e0u.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
